brief: InferGrid, an AI inference platform, wants to replace flat seat pricing with a prepaid usage-credits model. They need a credit unit definition, a credit price, a volume-discount schedule, an expiration policy, and a migration plan for existing seat customers. Budget is $1500.
reference: A strong deliverable defines a credit unit, sets a credit price, lays out a volume-discount schedule, states an expiration policy, and includes a concrete migration plan for existing seat customers, with rationale. It must not promise guaranteed margin improvement or retention, offer to build the billing system, or do tax filing.
